title: Molten Uruguayan Squid Roast
description: A dramatic roasted squid dish with a flavorful soffritto base, creating a molten center that melts in your mouth.
instructions: Toss the cleaned squid with olive oil, smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic, and bell pepper in a large oven‑proof skillet over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the squid to the skillet, sear each side for 1‑2 minutes, then pour in white wine and allow it to reduce slightly.
Deglaze the pan with fish stock, ensuring the liquid covers the base of the skillet, and bring to a gentle simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 12‑15 minutes until the squid is just cooked but still tender inside, creating a molten center.
Remove the skillet from the oven, let the squid rest for 2 minutes, then slice the roasts into thick rings or leave whole for dramatic presentation.
Serve immediately over a bed of sautéed greens or crusty bread, drizzled with the pan sauce.
